markdown.content:
# ![CYJAX ThreatIntelligence Logo](https://github.com/Cyjax/CYJAX-Google-SecOps-Integration/blob/main/siem/Logo/cyjax_logo.png?raw=true) CYJAX Threat Intelligence Indicator Dashboard
---
### The Indicator Dashboard provides detailed information about Indicators fetched from CYJAX.
1. The Indicator Dashboard provides comprehensive visibility into threat indicators ingested from CYJAX Threat Intelligence, enabling security analysts to monitor, analyze, and investigate indicators of compromise (IOCs) across multiple dimensions.
2. Features interactive filters for Indicator Type and Handling Condition, allowing users to drill down into specific threat categories and severity levels for targeted analysis.

dashboardCharts.description: Comprehensive investigation table displaying CYJAX indicators for in depth analysis.

dashboardQueries.name: dec1e9fd-4e21-41c3-9479-929037468e89
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$entity_id = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
$ttp = graph.metadata.threat.associations.tags
$ttp != ""
match:
    $ttp
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct($entity_id)
order:
    $count desc
limit:
    10

dashboardQueries.name: bafba1bd-33aa-4dc6-8984-2f5fcdfbee03
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$asn_num = graph.entity.artifact.asn
$asn_num > 0
$asn_str=strings.concat("AS",cast.as_string(graph.entity.artifact.asn))
$entityid = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
match:
    $asn_num
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct($entityid)
    $asn=array_distinct($asn_str)
order:
    $count desc
limit:
    10

dashboardQueries.name: 74433396-ed5f-45f1-9f5a-025e082c42ec
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$date=timestamp.get_timestamp(graph.metadata.interval.start_time.seconds, "%Y-%m-%d")
$verdict = graph.metadata.threat.threat_verdict
$entityid = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
match:
    $date, $verdict
outcome:
    $count=count_distinct($entityid)
order:
    $date asc
limit:
    10000

dashboardQueries.name: fa27474e-bbd9-4386-b0f4-657deb1514e6
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$entity_id = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
$industry= graph.metadata.threat.associations.industries_affected
$industry!= ""
match:
    $industry
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct($entity_id)
order:
    $count desc
limit:
    10

dashboardQueries.name: 524ec7e8-677c-47c6-a586-51d808ac649e
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$entity_id = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
$handling_condition = graph.metadata.threat.detection_fields["handling_condition"]
$handling_condition != ""
match:
    $handling_condition
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct($entity_id)
order:
    $count desc
limit:
    4

dashboardQueries.name: 0de6e318-fe42-42f9-bfe9-a442b6df1310
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$ioc = strings.coalesce(
graph.entity.hostname,
graph.entity.file.md5,
graph.entity.file.sha1,
graph.entity.file.sha256,
graph.entity.file.ssdeep,
graph.entity.ip,
graph.entity.url,
graph.entity.email)
$uuid = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
$type = graph.metadata.entity_type
$description = graph.metadata.description
$handling_condition = graph.metadata.threat.threat_verdict
$source = graph.metadata.source_labels["source"]
$asn_org = if(graph.metadata.threat.detection_fields["asn_organization"]!="",graph.metadata.threat.detection_fields["asn_organization"], "-")
$asn_num = if(graph.entity.artifact.asn>0,graph.entity.artifact.asn, 0)
$geo_country_code = if(graph.metadata.threat.associations.country_code!="", graph.metadata.threat.associations.country_code, "-")
$geo_country_name = if(graph.entity.ip_geo_artifact.location.country_or_region!="", graph.entity.ip_geo_artifact.location.country_or_region, "-")
$discovered_at = timestamp.get_timestamp(graph.metadata.threat.first_discovered_time.seconds, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
match:
    $ioc, $type, $description, $handling_condition, $source, $asn_org, $asn_num, $geo_country_code, $geo_country_name, $uuid
outcome:
    $discovered_time = window.last(graph.metadata.interval.start_time.seconds, $discovered_at)
    $count = count_distinct($uuid)
order:
    $discovered_time desc
limit:
    10000

dashboardQueries.name: a6bcd180-30df-45b3-bdab-65bfc4c16880
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$country = graph.entity.ip_geo_artifact.location.country_or_region
$country != ""
$entityid = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
match:
    $country
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct($entityid)
order:
    $count desc
limit:
    10

dashboardQueries.name: 9ec711fb-acc0-4557-a990-2a48ec16561c
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.threat.last_discovered_time.seconds > 0
$type = graph.metadata.entity_type
$ioc = strings.coalesce(
graph.entity.hostname,
graph.entity.file.md5,
graph.entity.file.sha1,
graph.entity.file.sha256,
graph.entity.file.ssdeep,
graph.entity.ip,
graph.entity.url,
graph.entity.email)
$uuid = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
$description = graph.metadata.description
$handling_condition = graph.metadata.threat.threat_verdict
$source = graph.metadata.source_labels["source"]
$asn_org = if(graph.metadata.threat.detection_fields["asn_organization"]!="",graph.metadata.threat.detection_fields["asn_organization"], "-")
$asn_num = if(graph.entity.artifact.asn>0,graph.entity.artifact.asn, 0)
$geo_country_code = if(graph.metadata.threat.associations.country_code!="", graph.metadata.threat.associations.country_code, "-")
$geo_country_name = if(graph.entity.ip_geo_artifact.location.country_or_region!="", graph.entity.ip_geo_artifact.location.country_or_region, "-")
$geo_city = if(graph.entity.ip_geo_artifact.location.city!="", graph.entity.ip_geo_artifact.location.city, "-")
$last_seen_timestamp = timestamp.get_timestamp(graph.metadata.threat.last_discovered_time.seconds, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
match:
    $ioc, $type, $description, $handling_condition, $source, $asn_org, $asn_num, $geo_country_code, $geo_country_name, $uuid
outcome:
    $last_seen = window.last(graph.metadata.threat.last_discovered_time.seconds, $last_seen_timestamp)
    $count = count_distinct($uuid)
order:
    $last_seen desc
limit:
    10000

dashboardQueries.name: 8a76826a-ec5f-405e-9d5f-43b55c719392
dashboardQueries.query:
graph.metadata.vendor_name = "CYJAX"
graph.metadata.product_name = "CYJAX"
$ioc_type = graph.metadata.entity_type
$entityid = graph.metadata.product_entity_id
match:
    $ioc_type
outcome:
    $count = count_distinct($entityid)
order:
    $count desc
limit:
    30
